introduction: A short animated film where the main focus is not Beirut the city itself, but unfolds in it, as the main character finds herself an outsider in her own environment. The movie plays with the visual representation of the city. Beirut as a ruin; in a mixed media collage of today's city in what seems to be a post-apocalyptic time, or simply a deviated truth of everyday Beirut, where the water resources happen to have run completely dry.以《幻象貝魯特》榮獲坎城影展短片金棕櫚獎的伊萊戴格首部作品。渴水的城邦，女子放下她的渴望，宛若《第五元素》般戲劇性地躍下！擺脫烈日的羈絆和焦灼的桎梏，卻意外找到昇華的源頭。
